name: Captrix editor load and controls
description: Verifies that the deployed Captrix studio loads with the main editor controls visible.

planSteps.description: The Captrix AI editor loads, the main heading contains 'Make captions move.', and data-testid=project-status says the app is ready for a clip.

data-testid=video-input, data-testid=generate-captions, data-testid=caption-segment-manual, data-testid=caption-size, data-testid=style-creator, data-testid=position-bottom, data-testid=export-kit, and data-testid=reset-studio are visible.
